launchRule: Do not open controlled real intake until v2.8 implementation gates pass, v2.9 launch gates are approved, and the private environment is the only system of record.
publicSafetyRule: This public v2.9 launch package is fake/sample only. It must not collect or expose real private pilot records, meeting links, official Toastmasters records, access needs, incidents, payment details, member numbers, or authority records.
noGoTriggers: Any real private field, meeting link, official form, member number, payment detail, access need, incident detail, or authority record appears in the public demo, public repository, public screenshots, public CSVs, or fake-data Decidim sandbox.
Controlled intake opens before privacy notice, consent, withdrawal, access register, private environment smoke test, official handoff boundary, and go/no-go decision are approved.
Supporters, mentors, sponsors, demo-first attendees, or unsure contacts are counted as charter-ready founders without confirmation.
Public wording implies an official Toastmasters club, official membership, charter acceptance, or guaranteed pathway before the official process confirms it.
Incident, access support, withdrawal, deletion, or correction requests have no owner or response clock.
Weekly learning review or closeout decision is skipped, leaving no evidence for proceed, hold, or no-go.

sourceAnchors.label: Maiam nayri Wingara Indigenous Data Sovereignty

launchGates.gate: Authority to open controlled intake confirmed
launchGates.evidence: Private launch authority note with approver, scope, and pause owner
launchGates.noGo: Launch opens without named accountable authority

launchGates.evidence: Private form, record view, export, backup, and recovery smoke test
launchGates.noGo: Real intake starts in GitHub Pages or public repository

launchGates.evidence: Approved notice text and version date in private intake route
launchGates.noGo: Any real contact details collected before notice is visible

launchGates.evidence: Screenshot and public-report redaction checklist signed for fake/sample outputs
launchGates.noGo: Real names, contacts, meeting links, access needs, or incidents appear in public evidence

launchGates.evidence: Consent text, withdrawal owner, response clock, and deletion path
launchGates.noGo: Participant cannot withdraw or ask what is stored

launchGates.gate: Minimum schema in private form only
launchGates.evidence: Private intake form matches v2.8 minimum data schema
launchGates.noGo: Open text fields collect sensitive details before review

launchGates.evidence: Named access register with role, reason, approver, and review date
launchGates.noGo: Shared admin account or unreviewed private access

launchGates.evidence: Official paperwork, membership, payment, and charter acceptance path separated
launchGates.noGo: Official forms, signatures, member numbers, or payment details enter public package

launchGates.evidence: Private invite channel and access support instructions
launchGates.noGo: Meeting link appears in public page, public CSV, or screenshot

launchGates.evidence: 30-minute demo run sheet with moderator and support owner
launchGates.noGo: Demo runs without moderator, support route, or pause wording

launchGates.evidence: Founder candidate, supporter, sponsor, and demo-first routes defined
launchGates.noGo: Supporters or demo-first attendees are counted as charter-ready founders

launchGates.evidence: Private support contact, follow-up rule, and escalation route
launchGates.noGo: Access needs copied to public evidence or supporter reports

launchGates.evidence: Fake-data incident drill with owner, pause wording, closure evidence
launchGates.noGo: Incident handled only through informal chat with no record

launchGates.evidence: Four weekly review holds and closeout review booked
launchGates.noGo: Pilot runs without weekly learning and safety review

launchGates.evidence: Public info, EOI receipt, demo invite, consent, and closeout messages approved
launchGates.noGo: Unapproved public wording implies official club status or guaranteed membership

launchGates.evidence: Fake-data dry-run defect list closed or accepted with owner
launchGates.noGo: Real intake opens while high-risk defects remain open

launchGates.evidence: Private decision record with proceed, hold, or no-go result
launchGates.noGo: Launch proceeds on informal chat approval

launchGates.evidence: Retention, deletion, learning brief, and handoff closeout date
launchGates.publicEvidence: Closeout date and aggregate learning rule
launchGates.noGo: Pilot starts without end-of-pilot deletion and learning decision

intakeStates.allowedData: Name, email, timezone, track interest in private workspace only
intakeStates.stopCondition: Public form stores real contact details

intakeStates.allowedData: Private invite status and meeting preference
intakeStates.publicRule: No meeting link or invite list public
intakeStates.nextAction: Send private meeting route and access support note
intakeStates.stopCondition: Meeting link appears in public evidence

intakeStates.allowedData: Attendance status only, no detailed transcript
intakeStates.nextAction: Offer founder, supporter, or pause path

intakeStates.allowedData: Founder readiness status and 18+ confirmation yes/no
intakeStates.nextAction: Confirm eligibility route and official process boundary

intakeStates.allowedData: Private founder status and official handoff readiness
intakeStates.nextAction: Prepare official handoff outside public package
intakeStates.stopCondition: Official paperwork stored in Governance Commons public files

intakeStates.allowedData: Supporter role, availability, and public-safe preference
intakeStates.nextAction: Assign status-only updates unless private access is approved
intakeStates.stopCondition: Supporter receives member data by default

intakeStates.allowedData: Sponsor organisation, contact, proposed support in private workspace
intakeStates.nextAction: Separate sponsorship discussion from membership records
intakeStates.stopCondition: Payment or sponsorship details enter public demo

intakeStates.allowedData: Minimum support request and preferred contact route
intakeStates.publicRule: Support offered only, no needs detail
intakeStates.nextAction: Respond privately and minimise retained detail
intakeStates.stopCondition: Access needs copied to public notes or supporter updates

intakeStates.allowedData: Withdrawal request, response time, deletion/correction result
intakeStates.stopCondition: No owner or response clock for withdrawal

intakeStates.allowedData: Checklist status without official forms in public package
intakeStates.nextAction: Confirm official route and required documents outside package
intakeStates.stopCondition: Official forms or signatures uploaded to public repository

intakeStates.allowedData: Submission status, date, and owner in private system
intakeStates.nextAction: Track official response outside public evidence
intakeStates.stopCondition: Member numbers or official acceptance records exposed

intakeStates.allowedData: Private acceptance reference and next obligation
intakeStates.publicRule: Public wording checked before any announcement
intakeStates.nextAction: Move to closeout and official next steps
intakeStates.stopCondition: Public page implies acceptance before official confirmation

intakeStates.nextAction: Close or delete according to retention rule
intakeStates.stopCondition: Dormant records kept without review date

intakeStates.allowedData: Counts, lessons, no-go flags, and next decision only
intakeStates.publicRule: No real identities or private details
intakeStates.stopCondition: Public summary can identify a person or private circumstance

communications.purpose: Explain fake/sample boundary and private pilot pathway
communications.excludedData: Real names, contacts, meeting links, official status claims

communications.purpose: Confirm receipt, notice, withdrawal route, and expected next step
communications.excludedData: Public CCs or visible invite lists

communications.purpose: Share meeting link, conduct rule, access support, and pause route
communications.excludedData: Public meeting link or attendance list

communications.purpose: State what is collected, why, who can access it, and how to withdraw
Offer support without exposing needs to public reviewers or supporters
Explain founder confirmation and official handoff boundary
communications.excludedData: Official forms in Governance Commons public files

communications.purpose: Separate support from member-data access and charter authority
communications.excludedData: Member lists, access needs, payment details

communications.purpose: Move official paperwork outside the public package
communications.excludedData: Public copy of signatures, member numbers, payment records

communications.purpose: Review gates, incidents, withdrawals, founder count, and operator load
communications.excludedData: Unminimised private notes or unnecessary detail

communications.purpose: Pause safely, name next update time, and protect details
Share only aggregate progress, no-go status, and learning
communications.excludedData: Identities, contacts, access needs, incident details, official records

communications.purpose: Close the loop, explain decision, and record deletion/retention rule
communications.excludedData: Raw private records or official paperwork

learningMetrics.noGoThreshold: Any founder counted without confirmation route

learningMetrics.publicRule: Percentage only when sample size is safe

learningMetrics.noGoThreshold: Unanswered support request after agreed clock

learningMetrics.publicRule: Aggregate count and response compliance only

learningMetrics.noGoThreshold: Official documents stored in public package

learningMetrics.publicRule: No details, only closed/open count if safe
learningMetrics.noGoThreshold: Open high-risk incident without pause decision
One real private field in public evidence
Decision lacks evidence or deletion/retention result
